title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for any Ollama model; runs entirely locally.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and streaming support.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Experimental repo showing how to expose and call Python functions as tools through Ollama.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation pipeline using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri desktop app wrapping Ollama with a native UI for macOS/Linux/Windows.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official NPM package providing typed JS/TS bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official Python package to chat, embed, pull, push, and list models from an Ollama instance.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local LLM power to any server via Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that streams answers from Ollama models using Socket-Mode for secure internal use.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich terminal UI (TUI) for interactive chats and model management powered by Ollama.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds LLM autocomplete, summarization, and Q&A via local Ollama models.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app providing Ollama chat and embedding REST endpoints with admin UI.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP client for Ollama with GenServer-based connection pooling and LiveView examples.
